title: Immune infiltration is associated with distinct transcriptional states and metabolic profiles in chordomas.
snippet: Chordomas are ultra-rare malignancies of the axial skeleton with limited treatment options. Some tumors exhibit immunogenic features and respond to checkpoint blockade, but the biological determinants remain unclear. To investigate chordoma immunogenicity, we integrated spatial transcriptomic and metabolomic profiling. GeoMx digital spatial profiling was pe...
